    cad/pcb-rnd: update 3.1.1 → 3.1.6

    * Enable testing, though marked TESTING_UNSAFE= yes for
      "ld: error: unable to find library -lrnd-3rd"
    * Fix MASTER_SITES
    * Some linting
    * Sort LIB_DEPENDS
    * Fix post-{patch,install} order
